landing.hero.subtitle: AI-powered conversation practice that builds real language confidence. Designed for students, trusted by schools.
landing.features.title: Master languages naturally
landing.features.subtitle: Lingual mimics real-world immersion with AI that adapts to your level and interests.
landing.features.cards.speaking.title: Situational Speaking
landing.features.cards.speaking.desc: Practice ordering coffee, checking into a hotel, or making friends in realistic 3D scenarios.
landing.features.cards.feedback.title: Instant Feedback
landing.features.cards.feedback.desc: Get immediate corrections on pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary without the embarrassment.
landing.features.cards.adaptive.title: Adaptive Conversations
landing.features.cards.adaptive.desc: The AI remembers your conversations and adjusts difficulty as you improve over time.
landing.how.title: How Lingual works
landing.how.steps.choose.title: Choose a Scenario
landing.how.steps.choose.desc: Select from real-world situations or create your own.
landing.how.steps.speak.title: Speak Naturally
landing.how.steps.speak.desc: Use your voice to interact with AI characters. No typing required.
landing.how.steps.feedback.title: Get Feedback
landing.how.steps.feedback.desc: Review your conversation with highlighted improvements.
landing.how.steps.improve.title: Improve Fast
landing.how.steps.improve.desc: Track your progress and level up your fluency score.
landing.schools.title: Empower your language department
landing.schools.subtitle: Give your students unlimited speaking practice without increasing teacher workload. Track proficiency growth with automated grading and detailed analytics.
landing.footer.tagline: Making language learning accessible, effective, and fun for everyone through the power of AI conversation.
landing.footer.copyright: © 2026 Lingual Learning Inc. All rights reserved.

teacher.builder.subtitle: Choose what your students will practice, customize the AI tutor's behavior, then publish an assignment.
teacher.builder.create.title: Create an assignment
teacher.builder.create.subtitleQuick: Pick a Canvas page or assignment and let Lingual design a speaking practice tailored to it.
teacher.builder.create.subtitleAdvanced: Use Advanced mode to build from Canvas, a pasted source packet, a manual scaffold draft, or a scaffold-free custom system prompt.
teacher.builder.advanced.sourceDesc: Paste vocabulary, rubric notes, or lesson context.
teacher.builder.advanced.manualDesc: Write the assignment directly on the scaffold.
teacher.builder.advanced.customPromptDes: Write full custom instruction for the AI tutor. Scenario, grammar, whatever you want.
teacher.builder.canvas.connectFirstSubti: Lingual generates speaking practice from your Canvas pages, assignments, and discussions.
teacher.builder.canvas.pickerPlaceholder: Select a Canvas page or assignment…
teacher.builder.canvas.analyzeHint: Lingual analyzes the Canvas item and drafts a scenario, target expressions, and success criteria.
teacher.builder.source.label: Source packet
teacher.builder.source.placeholder: Paste key vocabulary, rubric notes, lesson context, or a custom teacher prompt.
teacher.builder.source.hint: Lingual will turn the pasted packet into a draft scenario, target expressions, grammar focus, and success criteria.
teacher.builder.generating.title: AI is designing your speaking practice…
teacher.builder.generating.subtitleCanva: Analyzing {item} and generating a tailored scenario.
teacher.builder.generating.subtitleSourc: Analyzing your pasted source packet and generating a tailored scenario.
teacher.builder.form.descriptionPlacehol: Brief description shown on the student dashboard
teacher.builder.form.studentInstructions: What students should know before they start this practice. Shown on the student assignment page in place of the scope and practice-overlay cards.
If left blank, students see a neutral placeholder.
teacher.builder.form.systemPromptPlaceho: Write the complete system prompt the AI tutor will follow. No scenario, target expressions, grammar, or language-mix scaffolding will be added.
teacher.builder.form.systemPromptHint: Analytics that depend on target expressions, grammar, or rubric dimensions will show N/A for this assignment.
teacher.builder.form.instructionsPlaceho: Teacher instructions, pasted source packet, or guidance for the assignment.
teacher.builder.form.scenarioPlaceholder: Describe the speaking scenario the tutor will run.
teacher.builder.languageMix.title: AI tutor language mix
teacher.builder.languageMix.hint: How much should the tutor stay in the target language vs. scaffold in English?
teacher.builder.languageMix.englishFirst: Novice-friendly - English leads, target language introduced alongside English meanings.
teacher.builder.languageMix.englishLedHi: English drives the conversation; target language carries key expressions and scenario moves.
teacher.builder.languageMix.balancedHint: Default. Alternates naturally between English and the target language.
teacher.builder.languageMix.targetLedHin: Mostly target language; brief English only when the learner stalls.
teacher.builder.languageMix.targetOnlyHi: Best for advanced classes - AI replies stay in the target language.
teacher.builder.status.title: Status
teacher.builder.publish.successSuffix: . Students will see it on their learning dashboard once published.
teacher.builder.list.title: Your assignments
teacher.builder.list.subtitle: Published assignments are live on your students' dashboards.
teacher.builder.list.empty: No assignments yet. Pick a Canvas item above and publish your first one!
teacher.builder.plan.rawMode: The AI coaching engine is off for this assignment (raw prompt mode).
teacher.builder.plan.title: How the AI will run this assignment
teacher.builder.plan.subtitle: A preview of how the AI is instructed, before any per-student personalization.
teacher.builder.regenerate.confirm: Regenerating will replace your current title, scenario, and other edits with a new AI draft. Continue?
